# ASAP Pest & Wildlife Removal

> One call. Problem solved. Peace restored.

## About

ASAP Pest & Wildlife Removal is a family-run pest control and wildlife removal company serving Metro Atlanta and surrounding counties. Licensed and certified by the Georgia Department of Natural Resources and the Georgia Department of Agriculture. Available 24 hours a day, 6 days a week for wildlife emergencies. Every job follows a complete four-step process: inspect, trap, exclude, and disinfect — so the problem stays solved.

## Services

- Wildlife Removal — raccoons, squirrels, opossums, bats, rats, mice, snakes, armadillos, coyotes, beavers, birds, bees, and more. Humane methods, no poisons, no cruelty.
- Residential Pest Control — ongoing treatment and prevention for homes
- Commercial Pest Control — scheduled service for businesses, property managers, airports, hotels, schools, and hospitals
- Exclusion Work — every entry point sealed, backed by warranty
- Disinfection — attic and crawlspace remediation after wildlife intrusion
- Free Inspections — phone consultation plus on-site assessment

## Service Area

Metro Atlanta and surrounding Georgia counties — including Cobb, Fulton, Forsyth, Cherokee, DeKalb, Gwinnett, and Fayette. Emergency response available 24 hours a day, 6 days a week.

## Contact

- Phone: (770) 691-3636
- Email: info@removeasap.com
- Website: https://removeasap.com

## Credentials

- Licensed by the Georgia Department of Natural Resources
- Licensed by the Georgia Department of Agriculture
- Humane, eco-friendly methods — no poisons, no cruelty
- 24/6 emergency response
- Warranty-backed exclusion work
- Family-run; serves homeowners, businesses, and property managers across Metro Atlanta
